message:
fix: resolve 9 rustdoc warnings + use tracing for circuit breaker logging (br-31hi)

- Fix 3 storage doc warnings: private const links, unclosed HTML tag
- Fix 5 server doc warnings: private item links, unresolved type refs
- Fix 1 CLI doc warning: unresolved self link
- Replace eprintln! with tracing::warn! in circuit breaker log_transition
- Add legacy Python reference dir to .gitignore
- Fix pre-existing rustfmt drift in queries.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -41,3 +41,6 @@ benches/results/
 
 # Conformance scratch runs (legacy python reference generator)
 crates/mcp-agent-mail-conformance/tests/conformance/python_reference/_scratch/
+
+# Legacy Python reference code (local-only, not part of Rust workspace)
+legacy_python_mcp_agent_mail_code/
